tweet: shipped 5 PRs. wired BYOP and media uploads into the ai dungeon master and product packaging apps. added dirtberry & claude to the model roster. changelogs now load dynamically from the news branch, so you can watch us ship in real time.
alt_tweet: adding dynamic changelogs makes you slightly more accountable. wired BYOP and media services into a few community apps today (dungeon master, packaging designer). also added dirtberry and claude models. 5 PRs merged.
image_prompt: Cozy 8-bit pixel art scene with dynamic Twitter energy. Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt is flying and wiring glowing lime green (#ecf874) cables into a retro arcade cabinet. Nearby, the round tan Nomnom creature is happily eating a glowing 'changelog.txt' pixel scroll. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. High contrast within the brand palette, nostalgic but beautiful.
reasoning: Lists specific app integrations and model additions straightforwardly. The dry joke about dynamic changelogs fits the builder ethos.
